title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates:
Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates!
